sections.markdown:
- Activity: Evening Run
- Started: 2026-03-13 19:10
- Distance: 7.1 km
- Moving time: 43:33
- Elapsed time: 43:33
- Elevation gain: 48.4 m
- Average heart rate: 155.5 bpm
- Max heart rate: 179 bpm
- Average watts: 203.2 W
- Average speed: 9.8 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `240` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `157.7 bpm`, ranging from `140.0` to `179.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `151.8 bpm` and second-half average HR was `162.3 bpm` (+10.4 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `164.6 spm`, with a working range of `129.0` to `199.0 spm` after excluding `4` start-stop outliers below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `161.7 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `164.5 spm` (+2.8 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `6:06 /km` across `7.146 km` in `43:33` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `6:19 /km` and second-half pace was `5:52 /km` (-28 s/km), so pace picked up through the second half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `155.5 bpm` average and `179 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `149.4 bpm` in the first half and `162.8 bpm` in the second (+13.5 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `43:33` out of `43:33` elapsed (100.0%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `6` stop segments and `0.6%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `62.4 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `10.6 m` and `35.8 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `29.8 m` in the first half and `32.6 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
